q: Decomposers receive energy in which form?
options: Sunlight captured by pigments in fungal hyphae
Carbon compounds in the organic matter of dead organisms and waste products
Inorganic minerals released by weathering of rocks in the soil
Chemical energy from oxidizing atmospheric oxygen directly
explanation: Decomposers (bacteria, fungi) break down organic molecules in dead organisms and feces through heterotrophic respiration, releasing inorganic nutrients back into the ecosystem for autotrophs.
